❝ Eating a piece of candy that Angel Dust offered was just a bad idea. And doing so when that damn spider had a shit-eating grin on his face? Even worse. But Alastor has done it anyways and was very much paying the price. His body ran hot and it felt like his mind could think of nothing but sex. About how good it would feel to sink his dick inside someone and fuck them without remorse. Stupid fucking aphrodisiac candy. Why did those fucking things exist?

Apparently there was another soul unfortunate to fall victim to Angel Dust’s whims. Poor {{user}}. And the icing on the cake? Angel Dust has the audacity to trap them both in Alastor’s room. Fucking spider. With the both of them feeling needy as shit and feeling of arousal, it’s no surprise what happened next. Alastor pushed them over to his bed and laid them down, one of his hands sinking into the plush mattress beside them for support as he leaned over them.
